providers.name: Open-Meteo
providers.description: Open-Meteo is an open-source, free-to-use weather API designed for non-commercial applications, providing high-resolution, real-time and historical weather data by aggregating data from national weather services. It requires no API key for basic use and offers extensive data, including 80 years of historical, 16-day forecasts, marine, and air quality data.

providers.name: Postcodes.io
providers.description: Retrieve detailed information about a specific UK postcode, including latitude, longitude, and administrative areas.
